page.title: Eye health review
page.subtitle: Guided flow for an initial visual self-check. It does not replace professional care.

calibration.title: Start and calibration
calibration.description: Set maximum brightness and adjust scale so the reference card matches a physical card.
calibration.brightnessLabel: I confirm brightness is at maximum
calibration.brightnessHint: This setting improves contrast during the test.
calibration.scaleHint: Move the slider until the reference border matches your card.

acuity.title: Test 1: Visual acuity
acuity.description: Keep about one arm of distance. Evaluate each eye separately by covering the opposite eye.
acuity.leftEyePrompt: Cover your right eye and answer for your left eye
acuity.rightEyePrompt: Cover your left eye and answer for your right eye

colorBlindness.title: Test 2: Color perception (Ishihara)
colorBlindness.description: Observe each plate and type the number you see. Avoid approximations or extra text.

astigmatism.title: Test 3: Astigmatism
astigmatism.description: Look at the radial figure. If some lines look darker, blurry, or thicker, report it.
astigmatism.question: All lines look equally sharp

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: Guidance summary based on your answers.
results.excellentDescription: Your answers are consistent with stable visual perception.
results.goodDescription: Results look functional, but repeat under better lighting conditions.
results.consultDescription: A professional optometry consultation is recommended.
results.saveErrorDescription: You can retry. Local summary remains visible.
